Just found a go-to reference library for black hair styles and I’m obsessed 😍 The range is unreal. If you draw or just love detail, you NEED to check it out! afroindex.org #drawingref #artresources
Finally got the energy to sketch again after a rough spell. Tiny progress but I’m proud 😭✨ Want to keep the momentum going—anyone else in a sketching slump?
New commission complete!! I had so much fun drawing someone’s character and leaning into all the little details 🥰 Thank you for trusting me with your vision! #commissionart #digitalart

We got him to quit—politely, of course 😌 But wow, it really feels like our efforts are making a difference. Small wins add up! #teamwork

Commission drop! I loved designing the vibe and capturing the personality in every expression 🥰 If you’ve been thinking about commissioning, now’s the time!
Minnesota board game nerds—Galaxy Games in Eagan is a gem. Friendly staff, fun atmosphere, and plenty of games to browse. Go say hi! 🎲
You know that feeling when you make a point and someone finally steps aside? Yeah. That. Our work is landing. Keep going. 💪
Hair ref appreciation post!! The details in afro styles are so inspiring. I’m stealing inspiration (respectfully) for my next drawing 😍✨ afroindex.org
